base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of player_fighter_dual — a character (boss) from 1981 galaga. Dual-fighter merged sprite — rendered after rescuing a captured fighter from Boss-Galaga's tractor beam. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dual-fighter merged sprite — rendered after rescuing a captured fighter from Boss-Galaga's tractor beam; two ships side-by-side doubling firepower. Signature Galaga mechanic
